{{Quote|It was then I was captured. But I am at peace because he is free. Maybe we'll work together again someday. He's a decent guy, after all.|Kav Dryfus on Ryannar N'on Dikasterar|<ref name="The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)">[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]</ref>}}
'''Ryannar N'on Dikasterar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Elomin/Legends|Elomin]] miner who was the first to discover the [[Elom/Legends|Elom]]. He was friends with [[Kav Dryfus]], one of the first Eloms he met. After the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] took many of his people captive, he and Dryfus went on a rescue mission. It was a success. However, Kav was captured. Luckily, Ryannar managed to escape. Dryfus later died in an Imperial prison.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-04-03 -->[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']] {{1stm}}
